changelog: Added a self-hosted to FoxDesk Cloud migration export page for admins
Added migration package generation with users, clients, tickets, reports, settings, and attachments
Added admin navigation entry for Cloud migration so transfer to SaaS can start
Admin pages now use a cleaner, lighter layout across system settings, users, clients, organizations, reports, recurring tasks, and activity
Installer recovery and force-install flows now require an explicit recovery token before dangerous actions are allowed
Admin impersonation now requires POST requests with CSRF protection, and GET impersonation attempts are rejected
Update dismissal and updater actions now enforce admin sessions and CSRF validation more consistently
Update packages and backup rollback handling now validate archive paths and prune files restored from backups more safely
Public report share links now correctly reject expired tokens with a 410 response
Automated Playwright E2E coverage now validates installation, login, tickets, attachments, admin security, updates, reports, backups, and rollback
